MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Owen Clements, Deputy City Atty. (Chief of Special Litigation), 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney
Theresa Buckley, Esq 415-554-4492, of the office of the Treasurer & tax Collector for Plaintiff CCSF.
Scott Bonzell, Esq. 510-625-7700 for Defendant ERIC SMITH.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court asks questions re: settlement, balance, Defendant's signature, contract of adhesion. Parties respond. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ERIC SMITH's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Taken Under Submission.*** (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing, The Court signs an Order Denying Eric Smith's Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication. (see scanned order for details)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Records Under Seal
Off Calendar Nov-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Owen Clements, Deputy City Atty. (Chief of Special Litigation), 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney
Theresa Buckley, Esq 415-554-4492, of the office of the Treasurer & tax Collector for Plaintiff CCSF.
Scott Bonzell, Esq. 510-625-7700 for Defendant ERIC SMITH.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court asks questions re: settlement, balance, Defendant's signature, contract of adhesion. Parties respond. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To File Records Under Seal.

Granted. Plaintiff to prepare a proposed order which complies with CRC 2.550(e)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
